Title: On .NET Live - AI offers benefits, but at what cost?
Author: dotnet
Description:
Everyone is talking about AI, which in 2026 generally refers to LLMs. Developers are learning how to use such tools to improve their productivity. Businesses are wondering whether they will even need software developers in the near future. But how do the economics of agentic software development stack up, and how will they change in the near future?

🎙️ Featuring: Steve Ardalis Smith (https://bsky.app/profile/ardalis.com)

#dotnet #dotnetdeveloper
